spoken_transcript: 嗯，今天早上去菜市場買菜。那個……好像是週五吧？買了點青菜和魚。阿母在診所拿藥的事我還記得，應該沒問題。欸，剛才是不是忘了說要帶傘？啊，好像沒有下雨。

acoustic_condition_info.description: 家中背景聲，例如電風扇、遠處人聲或碗盤聲。

generation_notes: CDR 0.5: Speech is mostly coherent with natural Taiwanese Mandarin style (e.g., 菜市場, 阿母). Contains subtle hesitation markers ([停頓], [那個], [好像是]) and one minor uncertainty about the day of the week, fitting very mild impairment without significant memory loss.
